appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Choose your preferred theme or follow your system settings. Custom theme changes are applied only when you save.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the application interface.

defaultBrowser.title: Default Browser
defaultBrowser.description: When set as default, BugLogin will handle web links and allow you to choose which profile to use.

permissions.title: System Permissions
permissions.description: These permissions allow browsers launched from BugLogin to access system resources. Each website will still ask for your permission individually.
permissions.microphoneDescription: Access to microphone for browser applications
permissions.cameraDescription: Access to camera for browser applications

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure Local API and MCP (Model Context Protocol) for integrating with external tools and AI assistants.

encryption.title: Sync Encryption
encryption.description: Set a password to enable E2E encrypted sync. If you lose this password, encrypted profiles cannot be recovered.
encryption.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
encryption.requiresProOrOwner: Profile encryption is available for Pro users and team owners.

commercial.title: Commercial License
commercial.trialActiveDescription: Commercial use is free during the trial period
commercial.trialExpiredDescription: Personal use remains free. Commercial use requires a license.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.clearCacheDescription: Clear all cached browser version data and refresh all browser versions from their sources. This will force a fresh download of version information for all browsers.

savedViews.title: Saved views
savedViews.nothingToSave: Add a search or group filter before saving a view

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.emptyDescription: Create your first browser profile to get started.
profiles.noResultsDescription: No profiles match your search criteria.

table.name: Name
table.cannotModifyUpdating: Can't modify profile while browser is updating
table.deleteProfileDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the profile "{{name}}" and all its associated data.

profiles.ephemeralDescription: The browser is forced to write profile data into memory instead of disk. Data is deleted when the browser is closed.

antiDetect.title: Anti-Detect Browser
antiDetect.description: Choose a browser with anti-detection capabilities

sections.basicHint: Set profile name and required browser basics.
sections.proxyHint: Choose an existing proxy or quick add a new one.
sections.advancedHint: Configure advanced anti-detect and extra options.

proxy.title: Proxy / VPN
proxy.noProxiesAvailable: No proxies or VPNs available. Add one to route this profile's traffic.
proxy.autoSaveHint: Proxy will be saved automatically when creating this profile.

modeHint.existing: Search and filter saved proxies by used/unused status before selecting.
modeHint.manual: Enter proxy fields manually when quick parsing is not suitable.

proxy.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, host, or port...
proxy.emptyFiltered: No proxies match the current filters.

version.fetchError: Failed to fetch browser versions. Please check your internet connection and try again.
version.latestNeedsDownload: Latest version ({{version}}) needs to be downloaded

deleteDialog.title: Delete Profile
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.profilesDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected profiles? This action cannot be undone.

proxies.title: Proxies
proxies.noProxiesDescription: Add a proxy to route browser traffic through it.

quickAdd.label: Quick add proxy
quickAdd.placeholder:
Paste proxies here.
Supported formats:
http://user:pass@host:port
host:port:user:pass
user:pass:host:port
host port user pass
IP: host\nHTTP Port: 8080\nUsername: user\nPassword: pass
quickAdd.description: Paste one or many proxies. BugLogin will auto-parse common formats and import every valid entry.

validation.noValid: No valid proxies found. {{count}} entries need manual review.

autoType.unavailable: Could not determine best proxy protocol.

failures.auth: Authentication failed. Open Edit Proxy and verify username/password.
failures.network: Network connection failed. Check host, port, and network reachability.
failures.timeout: Connection timed out. Retry now or use another proxy endpoint.
failures.blocked: Proxy endpoint seems blocked. Retry or switch to another endpoint.
failures.invalid: Proxy configuration appears invalid. Update the proxy fields and retry.
failures.unknown: Proxy validation failed. Retry first, then edit proxy settings if needed.

tooltips.retryHint: Click check again to retry, or edit this proxy.

groups.title: Groups
groups.noGroupsDescription: Create a group to organize your profiles.

mode.title: Profile Sync
mode.encryptedDescription: Encrypted before upload. Server never sees plaintext data.
mode.noPasswordWarning: E2E password not set. Please set a password in Settings.
mode.passwordRequired: E2E password not set. Please set a password in Settings first.

sync.title: Account
sync.description: Connect to a sync server to synchronize your profiles, proxies, and groups across devices.

cloud.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out? Cloud sync will stop.

team.title: Team
team.name: Team Name
team.manageOnWeb: Manage team on the web dashboard
team.cannotLaunchLocked: Cannot launch — profile is in use by {{email}}
team.permissionDenied: Your team role does not allow this action.

api.title: Local API
api.description: Enable the local API server for external integrations.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.description: Enable the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI assistant integrations.

import.title: Import Profile
import.description: Import an existing browser profile from your system.
import.noProfilesDescription: No browser profiles were detected on your system.

fingerprint.title: Fingerprint
fingerprint.randomizeDescription: Generate a new fingerprint each time the browser is launched.

os.title: Operating System
os.description: The operating system to emulate for fingerprint generation.

fingerprint.title: Fingerprint
fingerprint.randomizeDescription: Generate a new fingerprint each time the browser is launched.

os.title: Operating System
os.description: The operating system to emulate for fingerprint generation.

import.title: Import Cookies
import.description: Import cookies from a Netscape or JSON format file.
import.proFeature: Cookie import is a Pro feature

errors.invalidPort: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

fingerprint.crossOsWarning: Spoofing fingerprint for a different operating system is less reliable because it is impossible to perfectly mimic all underlying components. Use with caution.
fingerprint.crossOsLimitations: Cross-OS fingerprinting has limitations. System-level APIs may still reflect your actual operating system, and some features may have degraded performance.
fingerprint.generateRandomOnLaunch: Generate random fingerprint on every launch
fingerprint.generateRandomDescription: When enabled, a new fingerprint will be generated each time the browser is launched.
fingerprint.generateRandomDescriptionAuto: When enabled, a new fingerprint will be generated each time the browser is launched. The generated fingerprint is saved for reference.
fingerprint.autoLocationDescription: Automatically configure location information based on proxy configuration or your connection if no proxy provided
fingerprint.editingDisabledRunning: Fingerprint editing is disabled because the profile is currently running. Stop the profile to make changes.
fingerprint.editingDisabledRandomized: Fingerprint editing is disabled because random fingerprint generation is enabled. Disable the option above to manually edit the fingerprint configuration.
fingerprint.advancedWarning: Warning: Only edit these parameters if you know what you're doing. Incorrect values may break websites, make them detect you, and lead to hard-to-debug bugs.
fingerprint.basicWarning: Warning: Only edit these parameters if you know what you're doing.
fingerprint.timezoneGeolocationDescription: These values override the browser's timezone and geolocation APIs.
fingerprint.canvasNoiseSeedDescription: This seed is used to generate a consistent but unique canvas fingerprint. Each profile should have a different seed.

warnings.windowResizeDescription: Changing browser window dimensions may increase the chance of website detection that browser information is spoofed.
warnings.windowResizeCamoufoxDescription: Camoufox locks the viewport to the spoofed screen dimensions for anti-fingerprinting. Resizing the window may cause cropped or grey areas. This is expected behavior.

syncAll.title: Enable Sync for Existing Items
syncAll.description: You have items that are not being synced. Would you like to enable sync for all of them?

crossOs.viewOnly: This profile was created on {{os}} and is not supported on this system
crossOs.cannotLaunch: This profile was created on {{os}} and is not supported on this system
crossOs.cannotModify: Cannot modify sync settings for a cross-OS profile

network.bypassRulesDescription: Requests matching these rules will connect directly, bypassing the proxy.
network.ruleTypes: Supports hostnames, IP addresses, and regex patterns.

clone.title: Clone Profile
clone.description: Enter a name for the cloned profile

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Manage browser extensions and extension groups for your profiles.
extensions.managedNotice: Extensions managed here will replace any manually installed extensions in profiles when launched.
extensions.proRequired: Extension management is a Pro feature
extensions.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
extensions.deleteGroupConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the group "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
extensions.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a .crx, .xpi, or .zip file.
extensions.readError: Failed to read the extension file.
extensions.assignDescription: Assign {{count}} selected profile(s) to an extension group.

pro.fingerprintLocked: Fingerprint editing is a Pro feature
pro.cookieCopyLocked: Cookie copying is a Pro feature
pro.cookieImportLocked: Cookie import is a Pro feature
pro.cookieExportLocked: Cookie export is a Pro feature
pro.cookieManagementLocked: Cookie management is a Pro feature

automation.title: Automation Workspace
automation.description: Design browser automations on a drag-and-drop canvas, validate every step, and keep workflows ready for production handoff.

defaults.workspaceDescription: Launch a profile, open the target page, and keep the sequence ready for team handoff.

library.title: Automation Library
library.description: Drag blocks onto the canvas or click to drop them into the current flow.

inspector.workflowDescription: Define the workspace identity, readiness, and deployment context.
inspector.nodeDescription: Tune the currently selected step without leaving the canvas.
inspector.noConnections: This node does not connect to another step yet.
inspector.selectNode: Select a node on the canvas to edit labels, configs, and routing.

placeholders.text: Enter the value to type or inject variables like {{email}}

validation.title: Validation
validation.readyDescription: The flow structure looks healthy. You can continue refining selectors and payloads.
validation.startNode: Your automation should contain exactly one Start block.
validation.disconnected: {{count}} node(s) are disconnected from the main flow.
validation.profileRequired: Open Profile blocks must target a profile before handoff.
validation.urlRequired: Open URL blocks must contain a URL.
validation.complexity: This workflow is getting large. Consider splitting it into smaller workspaces for easier maintenance.

empty.title: Automation workspace is empty
empty.description: Create a new workspace or drop nodes from the library to get started.

start.label: Start
start.summary: Define how this workflow is triggered.

openProfile.label: Open Profile
openProfile.summary: Boot the browser profile that will execute this run.

openUrl.label: Open URL
openUrl.summary: Navigate to a target page and wait for the page to settle.

wait.label: Wait
wait.summary: Add a deliberate delay with optional humanized jitter.

click.label: Click Element
click.summary: Trigger a click on a selector with retries.

typeText.label: Type Text
typeText.summary: Type text into an input and optionally clear it first.

extractText.label: Extract Text
extractText.summary: Read data from the page and store it as output.

condition.label: Condition
condition.summary: Branch the flow based on runtime data.

loop.label: Loop
loop.summary: Repeat a set of actions across a collection.

screenshot.label: Screenshot
screenshot.summary: Capture proof, QA evidence, or output artifacts.

webhook.label: Webhook
webhook.summary: Push results to an external system at the end of a run.

proxyPage.title: Proxy Center
proxyPage.description: Keep proxies, VPNs, and quick network operations in a wider workspace instead of a cramped modal.
proxyPage.empty: No proxies yet. Open the manager to import or quick-add inventory.
proxyPage.quickActionsDescription: Use the full manager when you need batch imports, validation, or VPN editing.

settingsPage.title: Settings Hub
settingsPage.description: Keep primary app controls accessible from a full page, then jump into the detailed editor only when needed.
settingsPage.layoutNoteDescription: This shell is designed to move heavy workflows out of modal stacks and into dedicated spaces.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations Hub
integrationsPage.description: Monitor local API and MCP access from a page view, then open the full control center when you need config details.
integrationsPage.nextStepDescription: Use this area as the command surface for external tools and assistants that connect to BugLogin.
